prompt: Create a transform library for a matmul->add->relu fusion chain. Tile the relu by [32, 32], fuse add and matmul into the tiled loop, then vectorize and bufferize for GPU.

assertions.text: Uses split_handle to distinguish add from relu
Tiles relu (last op) by [32, 32] with gpu.block mapping
Fuses add into containing op first, then matmul (reverse dataflow order)
Uses IREE canonicalization patterns before bufferize
Full IREE entry point pattern (kernel_config + foreach_match + TransformDialectCodegen)
